name: Okta Stale Group Membership (90 days)
description: Detects active Okta group memberships for users with no recent login activity in 90 days.
query: SELECT m.user_id AS id, COALESCE(m.user_login, u.login, m.user_id) AS account_name, m.group_id, g.name AS group_name, u.last_login FROM okta_group_memberships m LEFT JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN okta_groups g ON g.id = m.group_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, 'active')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND (u.last_login IS NULL OR u.last_login < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '90 days')
remediation: Review stale memberships and remove users from groups they no longer need.
